name: Mnyunyizi Drip Irrigation Kit
description: Mnyunyizi Drip Irrigation kit is a one acre complete drip line system designed for small scale farmers in arid and semi-arid areas.

taxonomy.sub_category: Mnyunyizi Drip Irrigation Kit discontinued Updated on August 21, 2024 · Created on September 3, 2018 Mnyunyizi Drip Irrigation Kit Discontinued Mnyunyizi Drip Irrigation kit is a one acre complete drip line system designed for small scale farmers in arid and semi-arid areas. Developed By Illuminum Greenhouses Kenya Tested By Illuminum Greenhouses Kenya Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Discontinued Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Mnyunyizi Drip Irrigation kit is a one acre complete drip line system designed by Illuminum Greenhouses Kenya for use by small scale farmers in arid and semi-arid areas. Drip lines are efficient in water dispensation due to localized irrigation near the plant root. The kit comes as a complete set having all materials needed to ensure an all year round production of food. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 2: Zero Hunger Market Suggested Retail Price $1,490.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Small and Medium-sized Enterprises Distributors / Implementing Organizations Online retail from the Illuminum Greenhouses website. Interested parties can also visit their local offices in Nairobi - Kenya or submit orders through their Facebook and Twitter pages. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include GF1 Submersible Solar Pump , Amiran Shade Nets , AgroSolar Irrigation System , and SunCulture Drip Irrigation Kit . Regions East Africa, Sub-Saharan Africa Countries Kenya Manufacturing/Building Method Small scale production. Interview with representative Intellectural Property Type Trade Secret User Provision Model Users can obtain the product from Illuminum Greenhouses website. They can also visit their local office in Nairobi - Kenya. Distributions to Date Status Unknown Coefficient of distribution uniformity Unknown Highest limit burst pressure Unknown Maximum run length Unknown Minimum viable operating pressure Unknown Design Specifications The drip kit contains: Drip irrigation lines (15cm,17.5cm and 30cm spacing) P.E pipe sub-main 1 inch Starters and connections End caps Water filter Water tank 1,000 Litre Installation labour Product Schematics Technical Support Technical support provided by manufacturer. Replacement Components Replacement components are available from the manufacturer. Interview with representative. Lifecycle Unknown Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters Specified performance targets: Has a capacity of irrigating 1 acre. Comes with all materials needed for a full year production of food through irrigation. Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety No specified safety precautions. Complementary Technical Systems Illuminum Greenhouse Kenya provide a variety of greenhouse farming products to small scale farmers locally. Academic Research and References None found. Compliance with regulations Unknown Other Information Performance of the Mnyunyizi Drip Kit is tested by the technical team in corporation with local farmers. Interview with representative.
